subcodes.title: Words to the Baha'is, spoken on 1912-09-11
subcodes.first_line: I am exceedingly pleased because I see you firm and unwavering in the Cause of God. Some individuals are like rootless plants
subcodes.first_line_orig: خیلی مسرورم که شماها بر امر الله ثابت و مستقیم هستید بعضی نفوس مانند گیاههای بی ریشه هستند
subcodes.subjects: @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @symbolism, @characteristics and conduct of true believers, @praise and encouragement
